detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Allegro._transfer(address,address,uint256) (Allegro.sol#719-843):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (Allegro.sol#783)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (Allegro.sol#857-869)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (Allegro.sol#789)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (Allegro.sol#877)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Allegro.sol#841)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (Allegro.sol#1003)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (Allegro.sol#983)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (Allegro.sol#985)
	Allegro._rOwned (Allegro.sol#389) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Allegro._takeTeam(uint256) (Allegro.sol#997-1005)
	- Allegro._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (Allegro.sol#957-993)
	- Allegro.balanceOf(address) (Allegro.sol#545-549)
	- Allegro.constructor() (Allegro.sol#479-509)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (Allegro.sol#841)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (Allegro.sol#1011)
	Allegro._rTotal (Allegro.sol#403) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- Allegro._getCurrentSupply() (Allegro.sol#1153-1163)
	- Allegro._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (Allegro.sol#1009-1015)
	- Allegro.constructor() (Allegro.sol#479-509)
	- Allegro.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (Allegro.sol#641-663)

	- [Allegro.balanceOf(address)](Allegro.sol#L545-L549)
